{{CargoOrgan
|name=Magma Horns
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10669
|idx=26
|description=Born in boiling lava, those eerie horns exhale scorching heat—a manifestation of flame’s wrath and eons of fury.
|skill=Transform into a Magma Beast, dealing DMG equal to 163% of ATK!
|hp=1180
|def=154
|atk=230
|rush=129
|gene1=In Snail Arena, HIT +6%
|gene2=In Snail Arena, {race} ATK +60
|gene3=Snail Arena, ELMT DMG REDUC +4%
|gene4=In Snail Arena, DMG +6%
|gene7=In Snail Arena, DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
